message:
feat(huh): Add textarea word transformation operations

Add Go-parity word transformation operations for textarea field:
- transpose_left (ctrl+t): swap char at cursor with previous
- uppercase_right (alt+u): uppercase word forward
- lowercase_right (alt+l): lowercase word forward
- capitalize_right (alt+c): capitalize first letter of word forward

These operations match the behavior of Go bubbles/textarea:
- Transpose operates on current line, swapping adjacent chars
- Word ops skip leading whitespace then process word chars
- Cursor advances past the word after transformation

Includes 13 unit tests covering:
- Basic word transformations
- Edge cases (beginning of line, end of line)
- Multiline handling
- Unicode support (café, résumé)
- Keymap binding verification

Closes bd-15ay

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
